description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense arrangement of tall palm trees and lush landscaping, creating a private and tropical atmosphere. The structure features clean, rectilinear lines with a flat roof and a mix of light gray and white exterior finishes. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The property includes a driveway, a visible swimming pool area, and a paved entrance, all bordered by manicured hedges and planters. The front of the bungalow is set back from the street, with a row of palm trees and a low wall providing separation and privacy. The overall design emphasizes openness, integration with nature, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow surrounded by palm trees, featuring large windows, a pool, and lush landscaping. The design is sleek and contemporary with a focus on privacy and integration with nature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a dense row of palm trees and hedges along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, flat roof, and the arrangement of palm trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, backyard landscaping, and additional palm trees for privacy.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the pool, driveway, and the transition from the street to the property with palm trees lining the perimeter.
